note_text:
Patient: 55F presenting with advanced end stage renal disease.
Conservative management including disease-modifying medication, bracing was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with end stage renal disease.
Referring nephrology physician requests authorization for hemodialysis.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with end stage renal disease

note_text:
Patient: 74F presenting with end-stage chronic kidney disease stage 5.
Conservative management including bracing, activity modification was attempted over approximately 14 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring nephrology physician requests authorization for kidney transplant evaluation.
